hints.text: Plates long white w/ **maroon strip left**; trucks = black square plates, police = blue
hints.uniq_note: The maroon strip is Qatar's national colour — no other covered Gulf country uses it on plates.

hints.text: Car mostly blurred: **left-side antenna** + a sliver of the white pickup; **rusty clips** on the crossbar

shared_with.diff: Qatar: antenna **left**; UAE: antenna in the middle.

hints.text: Predominantly flat **sand desert** — few trees or greenery
Solid **white outer lines** + white/yellow middle (rarely yellow outer)
Round poles: 3 insulators (middle slightly higher) + **2 diagonal bars** connecting crossbar to pole
Chevrons **white-on-red AND white-on-blue**; crossing signs show a man **in a thobe**; 2022 World-Cup banners in older coverage
Well covered (main + some side roads); only **south & west** lack coverage; municipalities → numbered **zones on street signs**
**Antenna length = region**: very short → north; medium → Doha area; long → southwest

**Bollards on only a few roads**: horizontal road W of the map label = black-yellow centre lines; road S of Madinat al Ka'ban = greener + overcast; coastal road S of Fuwayrit = shrubs + coast; otherwise → the long vertical road W of the label

**Stadium/landmark spotlights**: Al Bayt = b&w stripes + tent roof; Lusail Stadium = golden bowl; Lusail Plaza = 4 screw-thread towers; Ahmed bin Ali = gahfiya-like structure + Mall of Qatar (boxy, ads, car parks); Education City Stadium = grey diamond cladding + **black-tiled roads** + brown ground-fixed street signs; Khalifa Int'l = open-mouth dual arches; **Torch Tower** = hyperboloid, tallest in Qatar (Baaya district)
**Truck-bed box metas**: cardboard box right → Lusail; black box left → SE of Ar-Rayyan (green area); black box right → Al Khor + around Torch Tower/Khalifa (boxes not always visible!)
Tripod coverage inside the airport — incl. a unique tripod **inside a plane**
